productDisplayName: American Tourister Unisex Black Trolley Bag
description: Style Noteamerican tourister presents a wide range of efficient, everyday laptop wheeler bag combined with impressive style. This compact and trendy trolley is specifically designed for your weekends away at work, strikes the right balance between convenience and style. The various compartments are anbsp; smart, neat and compact way to carry your laptop, files, clothes and all your essentials and is on thenbsp; top of our wishlist this year!Product DetailsOne main zipped compartment for clothes, two holders with click clasps to hold clothes in place, with an inner zipped pocket on the left and a mesh zipped pocket on the rightOne zipped compartment with a zipped, removable and mesh laptop holder for carrying easeOne zipped pocket on the front with a partition for enhanced spaceA smaller compartment on the front with an organiser sleeve to hold all your small essentialsOne stand and two wheels at the baseOne extendable trolley handle that has a zipped closure and one short padded handle for carrying easeBranding on the frontMaterial and CareSyntheticUse damp cloth to remove dust and dirtWarranty:2 yearsSizeHeight: 34 cmWidth: 44 cmLength: 21 cmWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
